_comment: Canned LLM responses for DEMO_REPLAY=1. Each top-level key is `<AgentName>:<call_label>` matching the replay_key passed by the agent. When a key is missing, the LLMClient returns an empty result and the agent falls back to its deterministic path.

NarratorAgent:memo.text: {"title":"Internal RFQ — SPY Downside Protection (8m)","objective_restatement":"Client holds $50M SPY and wants downside protection over an 8-month horizon, premium budget around 100bps of notional, willing to cap upside above 8%.","per_candidate_prose":[],"recommendation":{"candidate_id":"","paragraph":""},"caveats":["Indicative only; subject to dealer confirmation and live market."]}
